entity.label: Amminadab
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Chief of the 112 descendants of Uzziel the Levite (1 Chr. 15:10, 11).

nodes.label: Amminadab
nodes.description: Chief of the 112 descendants of Uzziel the Levite (1 Chr. 15:10, 11).

verses.text: Of the sons of Uzziel; Amminadab the chief, and his brethren an hundred and twelve.
And David called for Zadok and Abiathar the priests, and for the Levites, for Uriel, Asaiah, and Joel, Shemaiah, and Eliel, and Amminadab,
